headline: Quanta Services and lululemon athletica have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Quanta Services earns Bull of the Day on AI-driven energy infrastructure growth, while lululemon athletica faces slowing sales and pressure.

headline: Bear of the Day: lululemon athletica inc. (LULU)
summary: The athleisure power, which changed fashion for a long time, is facing changing trends, increased competition, and other headwinds.
